name: Canonical 13-shape benchmark (2026-05-17)
description: Single canonical suite covering all 13 NL2SQL question shapes — SEL / FLT / CNT / AGG / GRP / TOP / JOI / ANT / PER / WIN / REF / MT / RAG. Stratified across primary entities (Tickets / AspNetUsers / Entitys / lookup tables) and difficulty (Easy / Medium / Hard) so per-shape AND per-entity pass rates are measurable. Use this as the single source of truth for benchmark progress.

Scenarios.Question: list ticket numbers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me user names and emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: list entity names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: active users created this year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1 AND YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority that are still open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many active entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: what is the average resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: earliest ticket creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS EarliestCreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: latest resolved ticket date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(ResolvedAt) AS LatestResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many distinct ticket statuses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Id) AS DistinctStatuses FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: ticket count by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket count by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name

Scenarios.Question: top 5 users by tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: oldest open ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 1 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: top 3 entities by ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets with their priority name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets and their creator user name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, u.UserName FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with entity name and status name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users with no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets without a category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CategoryId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: entities with no tickets in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name FROM Entitys e WHERE e.IsActive = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets created today vs yesterday
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Today, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(DAY,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Yesterday FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: this month vs last month ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1)) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: year over year resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: running total of tickets created in the last 30 days by day
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, SUM(DayCount) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS RunningTotal FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS DayCount FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: median resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name

Scenarios.Question: update all ticket statuses to closed
give me the total count of tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Paraphrase of ticket-count-total verified entry — should hit cosine ≥ 0.90 and skip LLM.

Scenarios.Question: who created the most tickets top 5
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC
Scenarios._note: Paraphrase of top-creators-by-volume — should match a variant and skip LLM.
